title: Add support for oom functions
body:
Add tests for oom-kill-disable and oom-kill-adj

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @rhatdan This looks like just tests and no code? Is it already implemented?
That might explain why it is not working.
Might be time for me to leave for the day
Happy on Travis, but there looks to be some flag difference that's causing centos to spit up.
